analysis: The project is a website focused on black holes with an existing dark, cosmic theme. The HTML file contains sections for black hole information, interactive elements, and animations. The CSS file includes cosmic-themed colors, gradients, and animations. The JavaScript file handles interactive elements and animations. The current theme needs to be enhanced with more detailed black hole visuals, animations, and interactive elements.

improvements.description: Enhance the CSS file with more detailed cosmic animations, including swirling black hole effects, glowing elements, and interactive animations for better visual appeal.
Add more detailed sections about black holes, including interactive elements like animated slides and information panels that expand on click.
Improve the JavaScript file to include more interactive animations, such as smooth transitions for black hole visuals and interactive elements that respond to user actions.
